sentences.arabic: كَانَ فِي السُّوقِ رَجُلٌ أَعْمَى يَحْكِي الْقِصَصَ لِلنَّاسِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Na pijaci je svaki dan bio slijep čovjek koji je pričao priče narodu.
sentences.translationEn: In the marketplace there was a blind man who told stories to the people every day.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَجْلِسُ عَلَى كُرْسِيٍّ خَشَبِيٍّ وَيَرْفَعُ صَوْتَهُ الْجَمِيلَ وَيَبْدَأُ.
sentences.translation: Sjedio bi na drvenoj stolici, podigao bi lijepi glas i počeo.
sentences.translationEn: He would sit on a wooden chair, raise his beautiful voice, and begin.

sentences.arabic: تَجَمَّعَ النَّاسُ حَوْلَهُ مِنْ كُلِّ الأَعْمَارِ يَسْتَمِعُونَ بِصَمْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Okolo bi se skupili ljudi svih uzrasta i slušali u tišini.
sentences.translationEn: People of all ages would gather around him, listening in silence.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَصِفُ الأَلْوَانَ وَالْوُجُوهَ وَالطَّبِيعَةَ بِشَكْلٍ لَمْ يَرَهَا أَحَدٌ مِنْ قَبْلُ.
sentences.translation: Opisivao je boje, lica i prirodu na način koji nitko ranije nije vidio.
sentences.translationEn: He described colours, faces, and nature in ways no one had seen before.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّاسُ: «هُوَ أَعْمَى الْعَيْنَيْنِ لَكِنَّهُ يَرَى الدُّنْيَا أَكْثَرَ مِنَّا كُلِّنَا.»
sentences.translation: Narod je govorio: „Sljepoočan je, ali on vidi svijet više od svih nas zajedno."
sentences.translationEn: The people said: "He is blind in his eyes, but he sees the world more than all of us combined."
